fieldguide.cropcritters.torchflower_crit: A warmly glowing torchflower given magical life. Harvested with a hoe or tamable with a Lost Soul. Supernatural light follows wherever this critter goes. Likes to go on adventures with friends!
A sweetly fragrant pitcher pod given magical life. Harvested with a hoe or tamable with a Lost Soul. Farmer beware! An insatiable appetite means these critters will gulp up anything smaller than they are. Once domesticated, they won't eat bees, allays, or anything named/tamed. It produces something unusual when it eats something other than a plant.
A squat pumpkin given magical life. Harvested with a hoe or tamable with a Lost Soul. A temperamental little thing, it'll shoot seeds at anything it doesn't like. After being tamed, it relaxes and learns to plant with its seeds instead.
fieldguide.cropcritters.wheat_critter.de: A bushel of wheat given magical life. Harvested with a hoe or tamable with a Lost Soul. When given a home, it'll be on the lookout for getting rid of weeds.
fieldguide.cropcritters.poisonous_potato: A spud full of solanine given magical life. Harvested, I guess. Stomps on crops and poisons anything that gets close. What a little meanie!
fieldguide.cropcritters.beetroot_critter: A juicy beetroot given magical life. Harvested with a hoe or tamable with a Lost Soul. It loves snacking on roots in the dirt, and it's scared of the pitcher critter.
fieldguide.cropcritters.cocoa_critter.de: A glossy cocoa pod given magical life. Harvested with a hoe or tamable with a Lost Soul. A natural gardener, cocoa critters will harvest crops, pick them up, and bring them to the last hopper they remember. Their hands carry as many items as they are cute. Five cute.
fieldguide.cropcritters.nether_wart_crit: A volatile fungi given magical life. Harvested with a hoe or can be stabilized with a Lost Soul. These short-lived creatures cannot survive away from soul sand for long. When sprouted, they will either find unoccupied soul sand and plant themselves, or detonate near blackstone to transform it into more soul sand. Looks cute when tamed!
fieldguide.cropcritters.melon_critter.de: A stout watermelon given magical life. Harvested with a hoe or tamable with a Lost Soul. Known for their anxiousness, it'll spit seeds at anything it's scared of, which is most things. Friendship calms them down and encourages them to share their water with growing sprouts.
fieldguide.cropcritters.carrot_critter.d: An especially large carrot given magical life. Harvested with a hoe or tamable with a Lost Soul. Has a real talent for tilling soil, and gets along great with the cocoa critter!
fieldguide.cropcritters.potato_critter.d: A spud full of starch given magical life. Harvested with a hoe or tamable with a Lost Soul. Picks out the pebbles and rocks out of coarse dirt.
You'll want to search this one online.
fieldguide.block.cropcritters.trimmed_so: When in the area of effect of a soul rose, the trimmed soul rose will emit soul flame particles. Aside from decoration, it can be used to easily check if a block is affected by a soul rose
fieldguide.block.cropcritters.mazewood.d: A strange weed that spreads quickly, often found after lightning strikes. It spreads into the shape of a maze that miraculously always has a solution. Harvested with an axe.
fieldguide.block.cropcritters.strangle_f: A common parasitic weed, often found in swamps and farmland. Anything that walks through it is covered in invisible spores. If these spores come into contact with another plant, it can infect it with strangle fern. Harvested with shears.
An uncommon weed that can spread quickly, often found in swamps and soul farmland. Thrives from rain and moisture. Dies from direct sunlight or drops of lava. Harvested with shears.
An exotic weed, often found in soul farmland. Walking onto one hurts, and it'll keep you in place! Crop critters won't get hurt, but they will get stuck. Harvested with shears.
fieldguide.block.cropcritters.crimson_th: An exotic weed that can spread, often found in soul farmland. Easy to get stuck in, painful to get out of, and quick to grow makes this weed a nuisance. Harvested with shears.
fieldguide.block.cropcritters.withering_: An exotic weed exclusively found in soul farmland in the soul sand valley that can spread. All the things you don't like about the crimson thornweed, this does worse. On top of that, it converts soul blocks into blackstone, and withers whatever walks through it. Harvested with shears.
fieldguide.block.cropcritters.popper_pla: An uncommon weed, often found in farmland. Some time after it matures, it launches a husk of seeds called a popper pod. Seeds produced by popper pods will plant themselves as baby popper plants when they land. Shearing a popper plant after it is mature, but before it launches, will safely remove the popper pod. Use them with an elytra! Harvested with shears.
fieldguide.block.cropcritters.crawl_this: A common weed that can spread, often found in farmland. Slow to get through, but not painful to walk in, this weed grows fast. Harvested with shears.
fieldguide.block.cropcritters.puffbomb_m: A common weed, often found in fields and farmland. As the weed matures, a faint ticking noise can be heard from within, eventually exploding into a giant puffbomb! Small puffbombs are harvested by hand, and giant puffbombs are harvested with an axe.
An exotic weed that can spread, often found in soul farmland. If something walks into the waftgrass, it'll start to float! Harvested with shears.
